question_text:
In commit a0f7cba on 2026-07-07, you wrote line 19 of gradebook/analytics.py:
19:     elif score >= 60:

Consider changing `60` to `59`.

What observable grading behavior changes for a score at the boundary just below 60 after the D-grade condition changes from `>= 60` to `>= 59`, and why?
